Slide
We Have Flexible Solutions For All Investors

A financial plan is about more than just money. It’s about living your life without worrying about your finances. A financial plan creates a roadmap for your money and helps you achieve your goals.

About Us
Slide
We Have Flexible Solutions For All Investors

Financial planning is all about assessing your current money situation, making a list of long-term monetary goals and implementing strategies to achieve these goals.

Know More

ABOUT US

We See Your
Potential, We Invest
in Your Future

Australia Wide Wealth Services provide tailored financial advice aimed to guide Australians towards their financial goals and objectives. Financial advice is about enjoying life, now and in the future. Tell us where you want to be and we’ll create a roadmap to help you get there.

Know more
Group 33 (2)
Young Individuals & Couples
Aged in 20s and 30s
Working on your career and enjoy having a reliable income
Thinking about combining finances and/or starting a family
Would like to manage your expenses and make provisions for your financial future
Aware of how difficult it is to save and get into your first home
May be renting or living at home with parents
May be paying off a mortgage, loans, credit cards, cars etc
Group 33 (2)
Young Families
Aged in 20s, 30s or 40s
Want to provide financial security for your family but with a tight budget
Would like to allocate education funding
Need to protect assets that you have worked hard to build
May have reduced income due to one or both partners reducing working hours to look after children
Need to protect income in case you can't work for an extended period
Group 33 (2)
Professional
Aged in 30s, 40s or 50s
Medical specialist, lawyer, accountant, engineer, architect
May have established your own business or practice
Developing your stake in the business
Have enjoyed financial success
Open minded, approachable and appreciate good advice
Group 33 (2)
Planning Retirement
Aged in 40s, 50s or 60s
Enjoy a successful career but don't want to work forever
Have started to talk about how to fund your retirement
May have money to invest and are keen to improve financial knowledge
May have investments and are concerned with the volatility in the share market
Want help planning for the future - education, renovations, travel, retirement
Group 33 (2)
Enjoying Retirement
Aged in 50s, 60s or 70s
Have retired or are just about to
Want to enjoy the fruits of your labour and need help managing retirement income, including advice about social securit
May have Super as well as other investments such as managed funds, shares and property
Would like to make sure Estate planning affairs are in order

Testimonials

The service that is offered by Dhiraj of Australia Wide Wealth Services is outstanding. He explains everything brilliantly and gives you the best research available to help in making decisions in investing your money in a way that best suits you. Cant thank him enough for what he has done for us. Great Job. Thoroughly recommend people wanting investment advice to at least have a chat with him.
Lynda Poett

Contact Us

The information (including taxation) in this website is general advice only and does not constitute personal advice. It has been prepared without taking into account any of your individual objectives, financial solutions or needs. Before acting on this advice you should consider the appropriateness of this advice, having regard for your own objectives, financial situation and needs. You should seek personal financial advice from a qualified financial adviser before acting on the advice. Consider a Product Disclosure Statement before deciding on a product. Where historical performance information is stated, please note that past performance is no guarantee of future performance
